title: Technical Reports | EECS at UC Berkeley
content: Technical Reports | EECS at UC Berkeley Technical Reports - Gerald Friedland Enhancing GAN-based Vocoders with Contrastive Learning (EECS-2023-183) Haoming Guo, Gerald Friedland and Gopala Krishna Anumanchipalli Multimodal Contrastive Learning for Unsupervised Video Representation Learning (EECS-2022-206) Anup Hiremath Learning Rate Estimation for Stochastic Gradient Descent (EECS-2022-155) Nadia Hyder and Gerald Friedland Neurotoxin: Durable Backdoors in Federated Learning (EECS-2022-89) Linyue Song, Zhengming Zhang, Ashwinee Panda, Yaoqing Yang, Michael Mahoney, Joseph Gonzalez and Prateek Prateek Mittal On the Robustness of Learned Task Weights in Cross-modal Retrieval (EECS-2020-86) David Nahm
